query:
insert into certificates (
            serial,
            dn,
            country,
            state,
            locality,
            organization,
            organizational_unit,
            common_name,
            not_before,
            not_after,
            der,
            private_key_der,
            issuer_certificate_id,
            is_ca,
            trusted,
            subject_key_id
        ) values (
            null,
            $1,
            $2,
            $3,
            $4,
            $5,
            $6,
            $7,
            null,
            null,
            null,
            $8,
            null,
            false,
            true,
            $9
        )
        returning id
